channel.title: Tech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Tech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Science Corp raises $230M as it races to bring its brain implant to market
item.description: A source close to the company says the round assigns Science a post-money valuation of $1.25 billion.

item.title: Zeno raises $25M to speed up production of its battery-swap motorbikes
item.description: The startup, co-founded by Tesla and Apple alumni, has sold nearly 1,000 of its motorbikes so far.

item.title: How 1,000+ customer calls shaped a breakout enterprise AI startup
item.description: On this episode of Build Mode, David Park joins Isabelle Johannessen to discuss how he and his team are intentionally iterating, fundraising, and scal...

item.title: Meta will allow rival AI chatbots on WhatsApp in Europe, but for a fee
item.description: Meta will allow rival AI chatbot providers to offer their services on WhatsApp for a fee, which ranges from €0.0490 to €0.1323 per "non-template messa...

item.title: Rivian is betting its future on one of the fastest EV launches in US history
item.description: If Rivian reaches its R2 sales target in 2026, it will be one of the fastest ramp-ups ever of a new EV in the United States.

item.title: His house burned down. He used the insurance money to build PopSockets.
item.description: Does a consumer hardware company need to get on the VC treadmill to succeed? Eleven years and 290 million products sold across 115 countries later, Po...

item.title: Which iPhone 17 Model Should You Buy?
item.description: The iPhone 17e is here to fill out Apple’s smartphone lineup. Our primer on the differences and similarities of these iPhones can help you shop.

item.title: Trump’s War on Iran Could Screw Over US Farmers
item.description: The Middle East supplies a huge amount of the world’s fertilizer. Conflict in the region has sent prices soaring ahead of the critical spring planting...

item.title: USB Hubs Can Save You Lots of Hassles—Here Are 5 We Like Best in 2026
item.description: Ditch the dongles. These multiport USB hubs will maximize your connectivity options.

item.title: Google settles with Epic Games, drops its Play Store commissions to 20%
item.description: Google has dropped its commission, charging a 20% service fee and an optional 5% to use its billing services. It will also offer a new process for thi...
